items.content_html: EnhancedCodeblockDiff is an Obsidian plugin that enables simultaneous diff display and syntax highlighting within code blocks. With this plugin, you can visually identify code changes while preserving language-specific syntax coloring, making code comparison and review more efficient.
items.title: Syu-fu/obsidian-enhanced-codeblock-diff: EnhancedCodeblockDiff is an Obsidian plugin that enables simultaneous diff display and syntax highlighting within code blocks. With this plugin, you can visually identify code changes while preserving language-specific syntax coloring, making code comparison and review more efficient.

items.content_html: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window. So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid. Enjoy it!
items.title: gitcpy/diagram-zoom-drag: In obsidian, when you have a md file which contains large charts or diagrams, maybe something of mermaid, you will see those things are too large to show in mermaid window.  So i think it is a good way to take the obsidian plugin here. It could easily zoom in or zoom-out or drag the charts or diagrams of mermaid.  Enjoy it!
